Rasmus Nielsen

Professor of Computational Biology in the Department of Integrative Biology and the Department of Statistics

rasmus_nielsenobfuscate@berkeley.edu

The Nielsen Lab works on the development and application of statistical and computational methods for analyzing genomic data in the context of evolutionary genetics, population genetics, and medical genetics. We are associated with the Department of Integrative Biology, the Department of Statistics, and the Center for Computational Biology at UC Berkeley. We are also affiliated with the Lundbeck Foundation Center for GeoGenetics at the University of Copenhagen. You can read more about our research here.

Pronouns: he/him
